---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or new feature for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: Feature
assignees: ''
---

> **Note:** The technical review, code structures, and deep implementation details will be discussed in the comments. In this issue description, we focus strictly on the objective, suggested approaches, why we need it, and what it will give us.

### Objective
<!-- A clear and concise description of what the feature is aiming to achieve. -->

### Why do we need it?
<!-- Describe the problem this solves, the user pain point it addresses, or the value it adds to the project. -->

### Suggested Approaches
<!-- How do you envision this being solved at a high level? (e.g., "Add a new table for X, create a new endpoint Y, integrate with service Z"). -->

### What will we have after implementation?
<!-- Describe the expected outcome, deliverables, and how the system will behave differently once this is closed. -->

### Links / References
<!-- Add any related Jira/Trello tickets, Figma links, documentation, or related GitHub issues here. -->
- Link 1: 

---
**Available Labels for Reference (Select appropriately from the GitHub sidebar):**
- `Backend`: Backend Task
- `BUG`: Something isn't working
- `Design`: Designing a system/a website
- `Documentation`: Docs/wiki/manuals
- `Duplicate`: This issue or pull request already exists
- `Feature`: Developing new features
- `Frontend`: Frontend or UI Task
- `Improvement`: Enhancement/optimization
- `Requirements`: Technical realization of a feature
- `Service`: Core backend/Core Frontend/agent module
- `Structure`: Feature Foundation / App Foundation for Implementing on that
- `Task`: Unit of work
- `Test`: Verification / QA case
- `ToReview`: Temporary label to be reviewed and assigned the correct label later
- `Wontfix`: This will not be worked on
